title: [MSYS2] iverilog-vpi.exe not installed in the expected location
body:
In the CI workflow, iverilog is built and tested on the same environment. That's enough for ensuring that it can be built, and for finding issues with the codebase. However, it does not test `install` targets thoroughly. While doing so, I found that `iverilog-vpi.exe` is incorrectly located. From https://github.com/umarcor/MINGW-packages/runs/1496490134?check_suite_focus=true:

```
...
2020-12-04T02:35:10.7196792Z /usr/bin/install -c ./vvp.exe "C:/_/mingw-w64-iverilog/pkg/mingw-w64-x86_64-iverilog/mingw64/bin/vvp.exe"
2020-12-04T02:35:10.7525637Z mingw32-make[1]: Leaving directory 'C:/_/mingw-w64-iverilog/src/iverilog-master/vvp'
...
2020-12-04T02:35:14.5574195Z /usr/bin/install -c ./iverilog.exe "C:/_/mingw-w64-iverilog/pkg/mingw-w64-x86_64-iverilog/mingw64/bin/iverilog.exe"
2020-12-04T02:35:14.5901930Z mingw32-make[1]: Leaving directory 'C:/_/mingw-w64-iverilog/src/iverilog-master/driver'
2020-12-04T02:35:14.6371649Z mingw32-make[1]: Entering directory 'C:/_/mingw-w64-iverilog/src/iverilog-master/driver-vpi'
2020-12-04T02:35:14.6372705Z ./../mkinstalldirs "/mingw64/bin"
2020-12-04T02:35:14.6788531Z /usr/bin/install -c ./iverilog-vpi.exe "/mingw64/bin/iverilog-vpi.exe"
2020-12-04T02:35:14.7075384Z mingw32-make[1]: Leaving directory 'C:/_/mingw-w64-iverilog/src/iverilog-master/driver-vpi'
...
```

So, `vpp.exe` and `iverilog.exe` are installed preserving the `DESTDIR`, but `iverilog-vpi.exe` ignores it. As a result, it is not included in the package: https://github.com/umarcor/MINGW-packages/runs/1496490134?check_suite_focus=true#step:7:12

This should be easily fixable. I'm opening this issue not to forget it in case I don't get it fixed today.
